title: Auraglow Frosted Glass Realistic Flickering Flameless LED Decorative Candle with Safety Flame and Timer, Perfect Mood Light or Centrepiece
features: A beautiful alternative to traditional candles, with no mess or naked flame. It is housed in a tasteful white frosted glass candle holder.
The candle creates a realistic and relaxing flickering effect, using a warm amber LED and a gently moving imitation ‘flame’.
As there is no flame, these candles are safe all around the house even around fabrics.
Includes a timer mode that automatically turns the candle off for 18 hours after 6 hours of use.
Dimensions: 10cm x 7.5cm. Requires 3 x AAA batteries (not included) and will provide around 40 hours of continuous illumination before they need replacing.
description: Auraglow Frosted Glass Realistic Flickering Flameless LED Decorative Candle with Safety Flame and Timer, Perfect Mood light or Centrepiece This charming faux candle has a classic white frosted glass design that’s paired with a clever, realistic flickering flame. It even utilises real wax making it amazingly realistic. Battery operated with no naked flame, these candles are ideal anywhere around the house or for special occasions as a centrepiece. The warm amber glow and gentle glimmer creates a relaxing atmosphere, with no risk or hassle. A perfect decoration for the home or for events like weddings and it’s ideal at Christmas time. The candle has two modes: Always on and timer mode. With the timer you don’t have to worry about turning it off, it will stay on for 6 hours and switch off for 18 hours automatically. For example, if you switched to timer setting at 5pm, it will stay on until 11pm and do the same the following evening. The energy efficient LED has a long life that will far outlast any real candle. This means it is both safer and more cost effective than buying real candles again and again. Specification: - Requires batteries: 3 x AAA (not included) - Two modes: Constant on and timer mode - LED colour: Warm white - Dimensions: 10cm x 7.5cm
